title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Grofers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Grofers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grofers invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!
